article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
Star Atlas Holosim Play To earn On chain game Tutorial!
Cagy posted an interview with Star Atlas CEO Michael Wagner and Holosim tutorial.
Weekly Star Atlas Newsletter #195
Aephia published their weekly Star Atlas newsletter.
Atlas Brew #171 – Star Atlas Summer Recap
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas Economic Forum – September 2025
Star Atlas TV posted a video recording of the latest Economic Forum.
I am looking for guests to be on the podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact me.
I am launching a Star Atlas merch store. Please check it out at Intergalactic Gear.
I am also creating a “non-guild” guild. If you are interested in learning more, please go to Intergalactic Coalition.
Star Atlas Week in Review Podcast – Audio podcast where I break down everything that happened in Star Atlas the past week plus my analysis on what it all means. https://intergalacticherald.com/podcast/
Star Atlas Event Recap – AI audio summary covering all the key moments from Star Atlas community events. https://intergalacticherald.com/podcast/star-atlas-event-recaps/
Star Atlas Discord News Feed Newsletter – Star Atlas Discord announcements send directly to your email so you never miss out on updates from the Star Atlas team. https://intergalacticherald.com/star-atlas-discord-news-feed/
If you would like to support my efforts, donations can be sent to intergalacticherald.sol
